powerpagecomponent.content:
{
  "display_name": "FetchXML - Commission Values by Loan Officer",
  "type": 756150001,
  "value": "<!-- Last modified Tue Oct 21 12:39PM -->
<!-- Last modified Sun Aug 31 5:00PM -->
{% comment %} Define our own FetchXML query identical to Commission Filter {% endcomment %}
{% fetchxml loanOfficerCommissions %}
	<fetch>
		<entity name="lv_lvcompcommission">
			<attribute name="lv_lvcompcommissionid" />
			<attribute name="lv_entryno" />
			<attribute name="lv_amount" />
			<attribute name="lv_type" />
			<attribute name="lv_branch" />
			<attribute name="lv_loanofficer" />
			<attribute name="lv_borrowername" />
			<attribute name="lv_commissiondate" />
			<attribute name="lv_commissionbaseamount" />
			<attribute name="lv_bpscalculated" />
			<attribute name="lv_calculationtype" />
			<attribute name="lv_loan" />
			<attribute name="lv_xloan" />
			<attribute name="lv_losplit" />
			<attribute name="lv_cappedcommissionbaseamount" />
			<attribute name="lv_calculationschemalineno" />
			<attribute name="lv_calculationdate" />
			<attribute name="lv_description" />
			<attribute name="lv_periodno" />
			<attribute name="lv_xprofile" />
			<attribute name="lv_xloanamount" />
			<attribute name="lv_xloanofficername" />
			<attribute name="lv_xloanofficercode" />
			<attribute name="lv_loancardurl" />

			<filter type="and">
				<condition attribute="lv_type" operator="eq" value="Loan Based" />
				<condition attribute="lv_periodno" operator="eq" value="{{sqUISelPeriodNo}}" />
			</filter>
			<order attribute="lv_xloanofficername" />
		</entity>
	</fetch>
{% endfetchxml %}

{% assign valuesByLoanOfficerQuery = loanOfficerCommissions.results.entities %}

<!-- LEAVE:Snippet: FetchXML - Commission Values by Loan Officer 2504220755bbc -->
<!-- Last modified Sun Aug 31 5:00PM -->
<!-- Last modified Tue Oct 21 12:39PM -->"
}
powerpagecomponent.name: FetchXML - Commission Values by Loan Officer
